title: OSS Spec Project Index
description: Index of projects that implement OSS_SPEC.md. Each project entry tracks where the project's repo lives and which OSS_SPEC sections it can serve as a reference implementation for.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema file.

version.description: Semver version of this index document's shape.

spec_version.description: Version of OSS_SPEC.md the section references in this file are validated against.

source.description: Where the indexed projects come from (e.g. github.com/niclaslindstedt).

updated_at.description: ISO date of the last index regeneration.

name.description: kebab-case project name; matches the GitHub repo name.

description.description: One-sentence description of what the project is.

aliases.description: Alternate names this project is known by (former names, registry slugs, domains).

showcases.description: OSS_SPEC sections this project can serve as a reference implementation for. Each entry maps a spec section to a concrete location in this repo (under examples/) where the project's implementation has been copied.

section.description: OSS_SPEC.md section number this showcase implements (e.g. "10.3", "21.5").

title.description: Short label for the showcase, e.g. "Release pipeline" or "sync-oss-spec skill".

path.description: Path inside this repo where the copied example lives, relative to the repo root (typically examples/<project>/<showcase>/).

source_path.description: Path inside the upstream project where the canonical implementation lives.

source_commit.description: Commit hash of the upstream project the example was last copied from.

notes.description: Free-form notes on why this is a good reference (or caveats).
